verses.1: The LORD’s word came again to me, saying,
verses.2: “Son of man, prophesy, and say, ‘The Lord GOD says:
verses.4: A sword will come on Egypt,
verses.5: “‘“Ethiopia, Put, Lud, all the mixed people, Cub, and the children of the land that is allied with them, will fall with them by the sword.”
verses.7: “They will be desolate in the middle of the countries that are desolate.
verses.8: They will know that I am the LORD
verses.9: “‘“In that day messengers will go out from before me in ships to make the careless Ethiopians afraid. There will be anguish on them, as in the day of Egypt; for, behold, it comes.”
verses.11: He and his people with him,
verses.12: I will make the rivers dry,
verses.15: I will pour my wrath on Sin,
verses.16: I will set a fire in Egypt
verses.17: The young men of Aven and of Pibeseth will fall by the sword.
verses.18: At Tehaphnehes also the day will withdraw itself,
verses.19: Thus I will execute judgments on Egypt.
verses.20: In the eleventh year, in the first month, in the seventh day of the month, the LORD’s word came to me, saying,
verses.21: “Son of man, I have broken the arm of Pharaoh king of Egypt. Behold, it has not been bound up, to apply medicines, to put a bandage to bind it, that it may become strong to hold the sword.
verses.22: Therefore the Lord GOD says: ‘Behold, I am against Pharaoh king of Egypt, and will break his arms, the strong arm, and that which was broken. I will cause the sword to fall out of his hand.
verses.23: I will scatter the Egyptians among the nations, and will disperse them through the countries.
verses.24: I will strengthen the arms of the king of Babylon, and put my sword in his hand; but I will break the arms of Pharaoh, and he will groan before the king of Babylon with the groaning of a mortally wounded man.
verses.25: I will hold up the arms of the king of Babylon, but the arms of Pharaoh will fall down. Then they will know that I am the LORD when I put my sword into the hand of the king of Babylon, and he stretches it out on the land of Egypt.
verses.26: I will scatter the Egyptians among the nations and disperse them through the countries. Then they will know that I am the LORD.’”
